title: Error fetching options for non-public Supabase schemas
symptom: When trying to access non-public schemas in Supabase from n8n, the error 'error fetching supabase options' occurs.
root_cause: n8n requires specific configurations in the Supabase Data API settings to expose non-public schemas. If these settings are not adjusted, n8n cannot fetch the necessary options for those schemas.
fix_steps: Go to the Supabase project settings
Navigate to the Data API settings
Manually change the exposed schemas to include your desired schemas
Save the settings and retry fetching the options in n8n
agent_instruction: Adjust the exposed schemas in the Supabase Data API settings to include the desired schemas.
